title: WebRTC Data Channels
abstract: The WebRTC framework specifies protocol support for direct, interactive, rich communication using audio, video, and data between two peers' web browsers.  This document specifies the non-media data transport aspects of the WebRTC framework.  It provides an architectural overview of how the Stream Control Transmission Protocol (SCTP) is used in the WebRTC context as a generic transport service that allows web browsers to exchange generic data from peer to peer.
